name: Favorite Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Using an 8-inch or 9-inch springform pan, press your favorite crumb crust recipe on the bottom and half way up the sides - or use a ready-made crumb pie crust. Chill.
2. With a mixer, blend the first layer ingredients until smooth. Pour into the crust and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
3. Cool. With a mixer, blend the second layer ingredients until smooth. Pour on top of the first layer and return to the oven at 350°F for 20 more minutes.
4. Cool and chill before serving.
